title: Track and address FIXME tags
description: FIXME tags mark suspected bugs or issues that need attention but are often forgotten over time. Unaddressed FIXME tags can hide real problems and indicate incomplete or unreliable code that should be resolved.
recommendation: Review all FIXME tags and either fix the issues or remove outdated tags.

noncompliant.description: FIXME tags indicate known issues that remain unaddressed, potentially hiding bugs.

compliant.description: Address all FIXME issues and replace with proper implementations or remove outdated tags.

checks.message: FIXME tag indicates suspected bug or issue that needs attention
